trigger: Top-of-hour non-Figma MVP builder pass: expose the existing scoped review-history API in the visible app smoke workflow.
scope: Add an account smoke review-history panel that fetches /api/reviews/:submissionId/history for the seeded Maya submission and renders teacher comments, review decisions, status changes, and immutable submission versions without rendering Drive storage identifiers.
changes: Added a Review history card to account.html with a Load History action for the seeded alpha submission.
Added account.js review-history fetch/render logic for comments, review decisions, status timeline rows, and immutable submission versions.
Added a storage-identifier guard so the smoke UI refuses to render history payloads that include private Drive storage identifiers.
Added account.css history layout styles that preserve compact responsive rows.
Extended tests/account-and-evidence-access.test.mjs to assert the review-history UI, endpoint call, renderer, storage guard, and account.js syntax.
Updated MVP catalog, automation memory, run log, rebuild lane log, and handoff evidence.

validation.summary: Strict TypeScript validation passed with no output.
Static Wrangler/D1 verification passed; live Pages/D1 verification was skipped because CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is not set.
Aggregate check passed, including alpha contract, cadence, site options, Cloudflare static checks, tests, and typecheck.

generated_output.notes: No build command was required and no generated public-companion or stakeholder output was produced.

blockers: Remote D1 apply/verification for migrations/0005_submission_versions.sql still requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN for non-interactive Wrangler; this UI handles unavailable history gracefully and does not require live mutation.
known_limits: The primary alpha console still uses server-owned alpha state for its review history card; this run wires the API-backed review history into the account smoke path.
Hosted review-history success depends on remote D1 having the submission_versions migration applied.
next_actions: Apply and verify migrations/0005_submission_versions.sql against remote D1 once CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is available.
Move the same API-backed review-history renderer into the primary alpha/student-teacher workflow view when the Day 7 walkthrough needs the history on the main console.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended
